input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.4.1
            TITLE: technical inspection will examine all items included on the technical inspection form to make

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.4.1: Technical Inspection will examine all items included on the Technical Inspection Form to make
IN.2.4.1 Technical Inspection will examine all items included on the Technical Inspection Form to make 
sure the vehicle and other equipment obeys the Rules.

final_answer: Technical Inspection will examine all items included on the Technical Inspection Form to make sure the vehicle and other equipment obeys the Rules.
